services.name: pub.pdf:htmlToPdf
services.description: WmPublic. Converts HTML to a PDF.

input_parameters.name: data
input_parameters.description: Document HTML that you want to convert to PDF. Specify string or stream.

input_parameters.name: string
input_parameters.description: String Optional. HTML to convert to PDF.

input_parameters.name: stream
input_parameters.description: java.io.InputStream Optional. HTML to convert to PDF.

input_parameters.name: xslStyleSheet
input_parameters.description: Document Optional. The XSLT stylesheet that the service uses to convert the HTML to PDF. By default, the pub.pdf:htmlToPdf service uses the following style sheet: Integration Server_directory \instances\instanceName\packages\WmPublic\resources\html2fso.xml.To use a different stylesheet for the conversion, specify either bytes or stream.

input_parameters.name: bytes
input_parameters.description: byte[ ] Optional. The XSLT style sheet that the service uses to convert the HTML.

input_parameters.name: stream
input_parameters.description: java.io.InputStream Optional. The XSLT style sheet that the service uses to conver the HTML.

input_parameters.name: loadAs
input_parameters.description: String Optional. Form in which you want the pub.pdf:htmlToPdf service to store the returned PDF. Set loadAs to one of the following values: bytes to return the PDF as a byte[ ]. Select this option to use the resulting PDF as input to a service that operates on whole documents. This is the default. stream to return the PDF as a java.io.InputStream. Select this option to use the resulting PDF as input to a service that can process a document incrementally.

output_parameters.name: pdfData
output_parameters.description: Document A document (IData object) containing the PDF converted from HTML.

output_parameters.name: bytes
output_parameters.description: byte[ ] Conditional. PDF data as a byte[ ]. bytes is returned only when the loadAs input parameter is set to bytes.

output_parameters.name: stream
output_parameters.description: java.io.InputStream Conditional. PDF data as an InputStream. Returned when the loadAs input parameter is set to stream.

usage_notes: Usage Notes The pub.pdf:htmlToPdf service cleans up malformed HTML such as tags that are not closed, missing quotation marks, and improperly structured elements. Then, the service parses the resulting HTML and creates a PDF. However, if the HTML is still malformed after the service cleans it up and the HTML cannot be parsed, the service ends with an exception. The default XSLT stylesheet provided with pub.pdf:htmlToPdf is a general-purpose stylesheet. The stylesheet does not cover every possible HTML structure or formatting requirement. Different types of documents, such as invoices, reports, letters, or legal documents, might require their own custom stylesheet to ensure proper layout, styling, and formatting in the generated PDF.

services.name: pub.pdf:signPdf
services.description: WmPublic. Applies a digital signature to a PDF.

input_parameters.name: data
input_parameters.description: Document PDF that you want to sign. Specify bytes or stream.

input_parameters.name: bytes
input_parameters.description: byte[ ] Optional. PDF data as a byte[ ].

input_parameters.name: stream
input_parameters.description: java.io.InputStream Optional. PDF data as an InputStream.

input_parameters.name: name
input_parameters.description: String Optional. Name of the person or authority who is signing the document. The pub.pdf:signPdf service embeds the name in the signature.

input_parameters.name: contactInfo
input_parameters.description: String Optional. Contact information for the signer. Recipients can use the contact information to contact the signer to verify the signature. The pub.pdf:signPdf service embeds the contact information in the signature.

input_parameters.name: reason
input_parameters.description: String Optional. Reason for signing. The pub.pdf:signPdf service embeds the reason in the signature.

input_parameters.name: keystoreAlias
input_parameters.description: String Alias for the keystore that contains the private key to use to sign the PDF.

input_parameters.name: keyAlias
input_parameters.description: String Alias for the private key to use to sign the PDF.

input_parameters.name: loadAs
input_parameters.description: String Optional. Form in which you want the pub.pdf:signPdf service to store the signed PDF. Set loadAs to one of the following values: bytes to return the PDF as a byte[ ]. Select this option to use the resulting PDF as input to a service that operates on whole documents. This is the default. stream to return the PDF as a java.io.InputStream. Select this option to use the resulting PDF as input to a service that can process a document incrementally.

output_parameters.name: signedPDF
output_parameters.description: Document A document (IData object) containing the signed PDF.

output_parameters.name: bytes
output_parameters.description: byte[ ] Conditional. Signed PDF as a byte[ ]. bytes is returned only when the loadAs input parameter is set to bytes.

output_parameters.name: stream
output_parameters.description: java.io.InputStream Conditional. Signed PDF as an InputStream. Returned when the loadAs input parameter is set to stream.
